task_completion.description: Verify bookmarks from the HTML file are imported and organized into the 5 specified service-category folders.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Bookmark Manager or Bookmarks Bar showing folders exactly named: 'Housing & Basic Needs', 'Health & Crisis Services', 'Legal & Immigration', 'Employment & Education', and 'Benefits & Government', with bookmarks inside them.

task_completion.description: Verify accessibility-friendly font settings are configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Settings > Appearance > Customize fonts page showing the 'Font size' slider/value set to 20 and 'Minimum font size' set to 14.

task_completion.description: Verify the specified Chrome flags for reading are enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The chrome://flags page showing 'Smooth Scrolling' and 'Reader Mode' (or similar reading-related flags) with their dropdowns set to 'Enabled' and highlighted with a blue dot.

task_completion.description: Verify resource database search shortcuts are set up.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Settings > Search engine > Manage search engines and site search page showing custom site search entries with the shortcuts '211', 'law', and 'benefits'.

task_completion.description: Verify the homepage and startup pages are configured to the agency's required resources.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Settings > On startup showing 'Open a specific page or set of pages' with 'https://www.211.org' and 'https://www.benefits.gov' listed. Chrome Settings > Appearance showing the Home button enabled with the custom web address 'https://www.211.org'.

task_completion.description: Verify privacy settings are hardened for handling sensitive client data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Settings > Privacy and security showing hardened settings, such as 'Block third-party cookies', 'Enhanced protection' enabled, or 'Clear cookies and site data when you close all windows' toggled on.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Chrome graphical user interface to configure settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating Chrome's settings menus, bookmark manager, and flags pages, rather than just running terminal commands to modify Chrome's JSON preference files.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually imported the bookmarks rather than just creating empty folders.
integrity.visual_evidence: The bookmark folders shown in the Bookmark Manager should contain actual saved links/pages, not appear empty.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Chrome browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Chrome browser window should be visible in the screenshots, not just a text editor showing the guide or a terminal window echoing completion messages.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Bookmark Folders: 'Housing & Basic Needs', 'Health & Crisis Services', 'Legal & Immigration', 'Employment & Education', 'Benefits & Government'. Search shortcuts: '211', 'law', 'benefits'. Homepage: 'https://www.211.org'. Startup pages: 'https://www.211.org', 'https://www.benefits.gov'. Default font size: 20. Minimum font size: 14. Chrome flags to enable: 'smooth-scrolling', 'reader-mode'.
